REMARK: AS TO THE OCTOBER 10, 2025 HEARING RE: PETITIONER'S EX PARTE APPLICATION TO SET HEARING ON PETITION TO INVALIDATE ELECTION; THE COURT SETS THE MATTER FOR HEARING TO OCTOBER 27, 2025 AT 9:00 A.M. IN DEPARTMENT 301. ANY OPPOSITION IS DUE ON OCTOBER 16, 2025. ANY REPLY IS DUE ON OCTOBER 21, 2025. THE PARTIES STIPULATE TO REMOVE GRAMERCY TOWERS CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION AS THE PETITIONER. THE PARTIES FURTHER STIPULATE THAT GRAMERCY TOWERS CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION MAY INTERVENE AS A RESPONDENT IN THIS ACTION AND OPPOSE THE PETITION. COUNSEL IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A STIPULATION TO THAT EFFECT. JUDGE: HAROLD E. KAHN; CLERK: V. DA FONSECA. (301/HEK)

Petitioner's Petition to Invalidate 2025 Election is DENIED.

PETITIONER'S HEARING ON PETITION TO INVALIDATE 2025 ELECTION AND CONDUCT CURRENT RECALL ELECTION AND WRIT OF MANDATE
Off Calendar Oct-27-2025 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:
